extraction.one_line_summary: VINGEGAARD attacked on Hautacam to win solo, extending his GC lead to 3:26 over POGAČAR while VAN AERT's early aggression fractured the peloton before the decisive climbs.
tactical_patterns: VAN AERT attacked from the gun in green jersey to pre-position VINGEGAARD, splitting peloton before first climb.
POGAČAR isolated without teammates on final climb, UAE unable to match Jumbo-Visma's depth on successive mountain stages.
MARTINEZ and GAUDU attacked each other for podium spots while VINGEGAARD-POGAČAR battle raged ahead, revealing GC priorities shifted.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: won second mountain stage in yellow, extended lead to 3:26, confirming transformation from domestique to outright strongest climber
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: dropped on Hautacam despite defending aggressively, lost 47 seconds, team depth deficit exposed on back-to-back mountain stages
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: attacked immediately from start in green jersey as tactical weapon but dropped early on climbs, confirming mountain fatigue
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: finished fourth on stage, secured third overall, riding within himself while younger rivals attacked for positions
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: attacked MARTÍNEZ for time gains, always fights back despite difficult positioning
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: neutral: defended third place on stage against GAUDU attacks, fighting for final podium spot
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: dropped to fifth overall after being fourth, losing podium positions on final Pyrenean stage
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: present high on Hautacam supporting VINGEGAARD, demonstrating Jumbo-Visma's numerical advantage on decisive climbs
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: neutral: attempted to bridge to early VAN AERT move but failed, showing limits against explosive GC pace
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: mentioned as benefiting from early breakaway positioning similar to previous stage tactics
